narrative:
Seven Hills-01-A (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,159 registered voters, with 52.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 26.1%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.7 percentage points.
